solutions.solution: (D) As, F → 21, L → 15, A → 26, R → 9, E → 22. Similarly, B → 25, R → 9, E → 22, I → 18, F → 21. ∴ BRIEF ⇒ 25, 9, 22, 18, 21. Each letter is coded with its backward order letter position.
(D) Coded with (Sum of the corresponding positions) × 4. As, N O T I O N → [14 + 15 + 20 + 9 + 15 + 14] × 4 = 87 × 4 = 348
(G) As, J N U [10 17 21 13 21 06] → Opposite letter position. Similarly, P U S A [16 11 21 06 19 08 01 26] → Opposite letter position. ∴ PUSA ⇒ 161121061908026
(D) As, G A M E [07 20 01 26 13 14 05 22] → Opposite letter position. Similarly, N O T [14 13 15 12 20 07] → Opposite letter coding. ∴ NOT ⇒ 141315122007
(D) Corresponding position of each letter is squared. As, (9 × 9) (16 × 16) (12 × 12) 9 16 12 → 81 256 144. Similarly, (2 × 2) (21 × 21) (20 × 20) 2 21 20 → 4 441 400. ∴ BUT ⇒ 4441400
(G) Backward order letter positions are squared. Let us see As, 20 12 26 7 G O A T → (20 × 20)(12 × 12) (26 × 26) (7 × 7) 400 144 676 49
